'''√g-ng-ng''' ('''kagangang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lackey|lackey]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ng-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lackey|lackey]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √g-ng-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kagangang
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thigangang || jigangang || shigangang || kigangang
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthugangang || jujugangang || shushugangang || kukugangang
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thugangang || jugangang || shugangang || kugangang
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thugangang || jugangang || shugangang || kugangang
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thegangang || jegangang || shegangang || kegangang
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothogangang || jojogangang || shoshogangang || kokogangang
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thogangang || jogangang || shogangang || kogangang
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thogangang || jogangang || shogangang || kogangang
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || gangang || gangang || gangang || gangang
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || gangang || gangang || gangang || gangang
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || gangang || gangang || gangang || gangang
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || gangang || gangang || gangang || gangang
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thægangang || jægangang || shægangang || kægangang
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathagangang || jajagangang || shashagangang || kakagangang
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thagangang || jagangang || shagangang || kagangang
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thagangang || jagangang || shagangang || kagangang
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shagangang
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshagangang
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishagangang
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shagangangnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshagangangnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishagangangnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shagangangshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshagangangnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishagangangshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shagangangro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshagangangnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishagangangro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shagangangmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshagangangnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishagangangmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shagangangsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshagangangnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishagangangsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shagangangng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshagangangnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishagangangng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shagangangya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshagangangnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishagangangya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shagangangyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshagangangnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishagangangyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shagangangnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshagangangnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishagangangnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shagangangnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagangangnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagangangnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shagangangnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshagangangnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagangangnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shagangangshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshagangangnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishagangangshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shagangangshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagangangnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagangangshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shagangangshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshagangangnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagangangshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shagangangronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshagangangnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishagangangronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shagangangroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshagangangnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishagangangroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shagangangromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshagangangnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagangangromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shagangangmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshagangangnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishagangangmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shagangangmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshagangangnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishagangangmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shagangangmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagangangnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagangangmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
